title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Milkbasket Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Milkbasket Ventures Solutions family as a Frontend Developer in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Milkbasket Ventures Solutions:
Milkbasket Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Milkbasket Ventures Solutions!
